login.title: Login
login.emailOrUsernameHelper: You can login with your email address or username

register.title: Register
register.usernameHelper: 3-30 characters, letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only
register.validationFailed: Please check the form for errors

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

features.title: Platform Features
features.description: Your personal dashboard. Access user management, analytics, and platform settings.

hero.title: Launch Your SaaS Faster
hero.subtitle: Production-ready boilerplate with authentication, admin console, internationalization, and API integration. Start building today.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Login, register, 2FA, OAuth, password reset — all built in and production-ready.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.description: User management, analytics dashboard, blocked IPs, and application settings.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Multi-language support with 4 locales ready. Domain-based routing and cookie persistence.

api.title: API Integration
api.description: Type-safe service layer, token refresh, error handling, and Axios interceptors.

cta.title: Ready to Build?
cta.description: Clone the repo, configure your environment, and start building your SaaS product in minutes.

common.unauthorized: Please log in to access this page
common.loginRequired: Please log in to access this page

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: Password reset link sent to your email.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset successfully.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.successMessage: You can now log in to your account.
verifyEmail.failedMessage: Please check your link or try registering again.

verify2FA.title: Two-Factor Authentication
verify2FA.description: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email.
verify2FA.emailDescription: A 6-digit code has been sent to your email. Please enter it below.
verify2FA.totpDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
verify2FA.missingUserId: Invalid verification request. Please try logging in again.
verify2FA.codeExpiredOrInvalid: The verification code has expired or is invalid.
verify2FA.codeResent: A new code has been sent to your email.
verify2FA.resendFailed: Failed to resend code. Please try again.

setup2FA.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
setup2FA.description: Secure your account with an extra layer of protection
setup2FA.scanInstructions: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator or any TOTP app
setup2FA.backupCode: Backup Code (Save this in a secure place):
setup2FA.backupCodeNote: Use this code to access your account if you lose your device
setup2FA.codeLabel: Enter 6-digit code from your authenticator app
setup2FA.recoveryCodesDescription: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used only once to access your account if you lose your 2FA device.
setup2FA.recoveryCodesWarning: ⚠️ These codes will only be shown once. Make sure to save them securely!

recoveryLogin.title: Login with Recovery Code
recoveryLogin.description: If you lost access to your 2FA device, use one of your recovery codes.
recoveryLogin.codeHint: Enter one of your recovery codes (alphanumeric)
recoveryLogin.missingUserId: Invalid recovery request. Please try logging in again.

admin.newPassword: New Password (leave empty to keep current)
admin.toggleVerifyEmail: Toggle to verify or unverify user's email
admin.overrideEmailVerification: Override global email verification setting for this user
admin.override2FA: Override global 2FA setting for this user
admin.passwordHelper: Only fill this if you want to change the password
admin.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
admin.createUserVerified: Check to create user with verified email
admin.emailVerificationInfo: When email verification is disabled, new users can log in immediately after registration without verifying their email. You can still manually verify individual users from the Users page.
admin.emailVerificationEnabled: New users must verify their email before logging in
admin.emailVerificationDisabled: New users can log in immediately after registration
admin.twoFAInfo: When 2FA is required globally, all users must enable 2FA before they can log in. Users can set up 2FA using TOTP (authenticator apps) or email-based codes. You can still manage individual user 2FA settings from the Users page.
admin.twoFAEnabled: All users must enable 2FA before logging in
admin.twoFADisabled: 2FA is optional - users can enable it individually

analytics.title: User Analytics 🌙
analytics.noData: No data available for the selected date range.

cohort.title: Cohort Retention Heatmap 🔥
cohort.description: Each row shows a signup cohort. Darker colour = better retention.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.usernameHelper: 3-30 characters, letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens only
profile.overrideGlobalSettings: Override global settings for your account. Leave as "Use Global Setting" to follow the system-wide configuration.
profile.useGlobalEmailVerification: Use Global Setting for Email Verification
profile.followSystemEmailVerification: Follow the system-wide email verification configuration
profile.twoFAEnabledDescription: 2FA is enabled. You will receive a verification code via email when logging in.
profile.twoFADisabledDescription: Enable 2FA to add an extra layer of security to your account.
